title: Contact Official Travel - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Official Travel
Need help? Find answers to common questions about official travel passports. If you don’t find the answer you need, you can contact us.
If you need to travel urgently , answer the questions below to contact us.

## How to contact us about your special (green) or diplomatic (red) passport application
If you have questions or you want to find out the status of your application, you can contact us using our form.
- answers to common questions about official travel passports
- how to apply for an adult special or diplomatic passport
- how to apply for a child’s special or diplomatic passport

## How to contact us about an urgent Official Travel application
Contact us using our form. Make sure you give us all the required information so we can quickly find your application.
Write “urgent” in the Subject field so we know your request is time-sensitive. We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

## How to contact us as an employee of the Department of National Defence
If you have questions or you want to find out the status of your application, contact Official Travel.
If you’re mailing us your application, send it to
DND/Official Travel section (Passports) 101 Colonel By Drive Ottawa, Ontario  K1A 0K2

## You should contact the Passport Program
Regular passports aren’t used for official travel.
Official Travel can’t help you or give you the status of your application.
For regular passport applications, you need to contact the Passport Program.
- the passport help centre
- how to renew your passport
- how to apply for a new adult passport
- how to apply for a child’s passport
